vocab.exampleEn: Reliable sources are important when students research a topic.
vocab.exampleZh: 学生研究一个话题时，可靠来源很重要。
vocab.upgradeEn: Use reliable source, reliable method, and reliable data.
vocab.upgradeZh: 常用搭配：reliable source / method / data。

cycle.summaryEn: Do listening and reading like the real test, then check the mistakes right away.
cycle.summaryZh: 像正式考试一样做听力和阅读，然后立刻订正。

frame.useEn: Use this to answer clearly and naturally.
frame.useZh: 用来让口语回答更清楚自然。

meaningEn: This reading word helps Becky understand questions and paraphrases faster.
meaningZh: 这个阅读词可以帮助 Becky 更快看懂题目和改写。
promptEn: China drill: read the Chinese meaning, shadow the example twice, then make one Becky-style sentence with "reliable" using What I mean is...
promptZh: 中文母语者练法：先看中文意思，跟读例句两遍，再用 "reliable" 和 我的意思是... 写一句 Becky 自己的话。
sourceEn: This harder word is auto-picked for Becky and refreshes every day with a China-friendly output drill.
sourceZh: 这个高分词会每天自动为 Becky 刷新，并配中文母语者适用的输出练习。
